description_long: This object is a book with a distinctive, rounded cover, giving it a semi-circular profile when viewed from the side. The front cover features a dark, almost black background with a small, illuminated rectangular doorway at the bottom center, above which a dramatic, rocky mountain or cave formation is visible, rendered in a photorealistic style. The back and side covers are plain and solid black, with no visible text or decoration. The book appears to be of average thickness, with a hard cover and a matte finish. The overall design is minimalist, with the striking front illustration being the only visual element. There are no visible publisher logos, title text, or decorative elements on the spine or back.
description: A semi-circular, hard-covered book with a dramatic, photorealistic mountain or cave illustration and a small illuminated doorway on a black front cover. The rest of the book is plain black and unadorned.
description_view_0: The side view shows the book's semi-circular profile with a flat edge, all in solid black.
description_view_1: The front view reveals a dark cover with a photorealistic rocky formation and a small, bright doorway at the bottom center.
description_view_2: The opposite side view mirrors the first, showing the flat edge and rounded back, all in black.
description_view_3: The back view displays a plain, rounded black surface with no visible features or decoration.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a photorealistic illustration of a rocky mountain or cave formation, dramatically lit from above, with a small, illuminated rectangular doorway at the bottom center. The overall style is dark and moody, with high contrast between the black background and the bright doorway.
